stimulus:
Welcome! In this study, you will play three short video games, completing a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":3,"creativity-free-response":"I found it creative because of the different way of \"fighting\" against many types of monsters, even if in this case it is just a matter of approving or rejecting them.","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"It reminded me a little of a game called something like: Papers, Please.  Although I think the fact that there is a time limit is a novel feature that makes it competitive and fun.","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"I liked that there were different types of monsters, that you have to make quick decisions and that new instructions keep popping up. I found it really interesting to play.","authenticity-rating":3,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"As I mentioned earlier, it reminded me of another game I played a long time ago. But overall, I can't say I have seen many similar games. I think it requires a certain amount of creativity, and the mechanics are simple but with a noticeable difficulty curve. "}
